value.reason: The cited page is specifically about "Codex for Linear," a native connector that lets users delegate coding tasks from Linear issues by assigning issues to @Codex or mentioning it in comments — exactly the chat-surface integration capability described. The label "Codex for Linear" matches the official name used throughout the page. The description accurately reflects the page: assigning an issue to @Codex or mentioning it triggers a cloud task, and Codex can also connect to the Linear MCP server for local tasks. No invented claims are present, and the page is clearly about this specific chat/issue-tool integration, not an adjacent capability like mobile/web remote control, notifications, or other access surfaces.
